title: Small business workflow pain
author: sample-user
product_theme: AI-enabled tools for small-business operations, lean teams, and one-person companies
text: I run a small business and our workflow is scattered across invoicing, scheduling, CRM updates, and customer follow-up. We still do manual cleanup every week because the tools do not fit how a small team works.

title: Admin automation frustration
author: sample-user
product_theme: AI-enabled tools for small-business operations, lean teams, and one-person companies
text: We tried automating admin work, but setup took too long and the integration kept failing. For our lean team, the automation created another workflow to maintain instead of saving time.

title: CRM API integration problem
author: sample-user
product_theme: AI-enabled tools for small-business operations, lean teams, and one-person companies
text: We use a CRM for customer records, but the API integration fails when fields are missing. Our small team still has to fix customer records manually after each sync error.

title: Zapier automation error
author: sample-user
product_theme: AI-enabled tools for small-business operations, lean teams, and one-person companies
text: I need to create Stripe invoices from Google Sheets through Zapier, but each failed step is hard to troubleshoot without a developer. The workflow automation is useful, but onboarding and error messages slow us down.

title: Hiring software engineer
author: sample-company
product_theme: AI-enabled tools for small-business operations, lean teams, and one-person companies
text: We are hiring a full-time software engineer. Apply now for this job and review the salary range and benefits.
